purpose: A lightweight checklist for validator operators to verify health, metrics, balance, and snapshot readiness.

probes.purpose: Check node, database, and consensus health before treating a validator as ready.
probes.alert_rule: Alert when status is not up or when a required check reports down.

probes.purpose: Expose Prometheus metrics for node, GenVM, and WebDriver resource tracking.
probes.alert_rule: Alert on missing scrape data, high CPU, memory pressure, or stalled block progress.

probes.purpose: Track account balance needed for operational transactions.
probes.alert_rule: Alert when balance drops below the operator-defined threshold.

probes.purpose: Create an operator-authorized state snapshot for maintenance and upgrades.
probes.alert_rule: Require operator token and local or tunneled access before invocation.

boundaries: This is operator tooling; it does not claim the current wallet is running a validator.
The snapshot route is intentionally marked protected because it requires an operator token.
Reviewers can adapt the endpoint list to a local, tunneled, or hosted validator.
